heroes.name: Demon Queen
heroes.passiveDescription: All unit costs reduced by 15%. Spawning 3+ units within 5 seconds triggers a 4-second attack speed buff (+25%) for all active units.
heroes.startingBonus: Begins with 120 gold and one pre-spawned Imp.
heroes.lore: Once a mortal queen who bargained with the abyss for eternal power, she now commands legions of demons with terrifying efficiency. Her strength lies in numbers — a single imp is nothing, but a swarm is unstoppable.

heroes.name: Necro King
heroes.passiveDescription: When a friendly unit dies, gain 5 gold and 1 XP. Every 5th unit death triggers a free revive of the most recently killed unit at 50% HP.
heroes.startingBonus: Begins with a Skeleton unit that revives automatically after death.
heroes.lore: A lich-king who has transcended death itself, the Necro King views every fallen soldier as a resource. His armies grow stronger with each casualty — friend or foe — and his patience is as eternal as his undead legions.

heroes.name: Human Commander
heroes.passiveDescription: Passive gold income increased by 20%. Ranged units fire 10% faster. Every tier unlock grants a one-time gold bonus of 75 gold.
heroes.startingBonus: Begins with 150 gold and a static defensive turret pre-placed on the lane.
heroes.lore: A decorated veteran of a hundred campaigns, the Human Commander relies on discipline, superior firepower, and economic dominance. Where demons swarm and undead shamble, humans adapt, fortify, and overwhelm.

staticUnits.name: Turret
staticUnits.description: A pre-built defensive turret. Cannot move but fires rapidly at approaching enemies.
